calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Terminating Trust Tdue To Changed Circumstances And/Or Instructing Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-27-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amy Shelf for and with Lisa Franks.

Ms. Shelf explained the changed circumstances to suupport termination of the Trust. The Petition for Order Terminating Trust Due To Changed Circumstances and/or Instructions was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K.Tauscher.
